prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年理科/物理类最低位次分别为约27名→23名→22名→25名→31名，整体呈小幅后移趋势，近3年累计后移约9名；2025年基准位次约31名；本省理科/物理类计划2021–2024年均为7人，2025年增至9人；2026年计划仍为9人，较2025年持平，扩招效应已在前两年释放，2026年无额外计划变化。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985、211、双一流；软科主榜2021–2026年稳定第2名，全国顶尖学府地位稳固；2026年声誉评价偏负面（校园安全、食堂宿舍等舆情），但北京大学作为顶尖 名校，声誉波动对报考热度影响有限；抖音热度高热（总排名第3），关注度极高；未见明显投档断档记录；拥有A+学科20余个（法学、数学、物理学、化学、 计算机科学与技术、生物学、临床医学等），学科实力全国顶尖，对高分考生吸引力极强。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等理科热门专业持续高 热；本省2026年考生总数约48000人（较2025年物理类+历史类合计47669人略有增加），竞争略加剧。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次后移趋势、2026年招生计划持平、本省考生总数略有增加以及北京大学持续的高关注度，在2025年基准31名基础上预计竞争略有加剧；预测最低位次约34名，区间29 –39名。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间29–39名内建议以二档为主、一档冲刺、三档保底；位次明显优于区间下限（如29名以内）可重点冲刺元培、计算机等王牌专业；位次接近区间上限（39名左右） 建议以三档稳妥专业为主。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for science/physics category were approximately 27th → 23rd → 22nd → 25th → 31st, showing a slight overall backward trend, with a cumulative backward shift of about 9 positions in the last 3 years; the baseline ranking for 2025 is about 31st; the provincial science/physics enrollment plan was 7 students from 2021 to 2024, increased to 9 students in 2025; the 2026 plan remains 9 students, unchanged from 2025, with the expansion effect already released in the previous two years, and no additional plan changes in 2026.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class; stable at 2nd place in the Soft Science main ranking from 2021 to 2026, with a solid top-tier national status; the 2026 reputation evaluation is somewhat negative (campus safety, dormitory, and other public opinion), but as a top prestigious university, reputation fluctuations have limited impact on application popularity; high popularity on Douyin (total ranking 3rd), with extremely high attention; no obvious record of enrollment gaps; has over 20 A+ disciplines (Law, Mathematics, Physics, Chemistry, Computer Science and Technology, Biology, Clinical Medicine, etc.), with top-tier national academic strength, strongly attracting high-scoring candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Popular science majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering continue to be highly sought after; the total number of candidates in the province for 2026 is about 48,000 (slightly increased from the combined 47,669 physics and history candidates in 2025), with slightly intensified competition.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the historical backward trend in rankings, the unchanged enrollment plan for 2026, a slight increase in the total number of provincial candidates, and the sustained high attention on Peking University, competition is expected to slightly intensify based on the 2025 baseline ranking of 31st; the predicted minimum ranking is about 34th, with a range of 29 to 39.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 29–39, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 as the main choice, with Tier 1 as a reach and Tier 3 as a safety; for rankings significantly better than the lower limit (e.g., within 29), prioritize top majors like Yuanpei and Computer Science; for rankings near the upper limit (around 39), focus on safe majors in Tier 3.

历年位次与招生计划.text: In 2021, the liberal arts ranking data was abnormal (0 students, unavailable). In 2024, the minimum liberal arts ranking was approximately 10th. In 2025, the minimum history category ranking was approximately 11th. In recent years, the ranking has been basically stable in the 10–11 range. The provincial liberal arts/history category enrollment plan from 2021 to 2025 was 8 students each year. The 2026 plan remains 8 students, unchanged from 2025, with no plan changes.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class; Soft Science main ranking stable at 2nd place from 2021 to 2026, a top national institution with a solid status. In 2026, reputation evaluation is somewhat negative (campus safety and other public opinion), but as a top prestigious university, the impact on Peking University is limited. High popularity on Douyin (total ranking 3rd), extremely high attention. Law A+, Chinese Language and Literature A+, Sociology A+, Foreign Languages and Literature A+, and other liberal arts advantageous disciplines are nationally leading, attracting high-scoring liberal arts students strongly.

专业热度与地域.text: Law recommended, Chinese Language/Literature recommended, etc. Liberal arts major popularity is stable to slightly hot. In 2026, the total number of examinees in the province is about 48,000 (slightly increased compared to 2025), competition slightly intensifies.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the basically stable historical rankings, unchanged 2026 enrollment plan, slight increase in total examinees in the province, and Peking University's sustained high attention, competition is expected to slightly intensify on the basis of the 2025 benchmark of 11th. The predicted minimum ranking is about 13th, with a range of 10–16.
